mapper.select: SELECT * FROM problem WHERE title = #{title} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem (title, content, input, output, difficulty, language, time_limit, memory_limit, tags, knowledge_points, hints, sample_explanation) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{input}, #{output}, #{difficulty}, #{language}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{tags}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{hints}, #{sampleExplanation})
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, input = #{input}, output = #{output}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, language = #{language}, time_limit = #{timeLimit}, memory_limit = #{memoryLimit}, tags = #{tags}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, hints = #{hints}, sample_explanation = #{sampleExplanation}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM problem WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags) > 0 ORDER BY id DESC
